meaning: adj.小泡的,有小泡的,由小泡组成的
examples: Dermatitis herpetiformis presents with intense pruritus and a vesicular eruption.
Full of or bearing vesicles; vesicular.
If skin is very dry, he also suggests products using a technology called vesicular emulsion.
In the most recent case, the infant developed a fever seven days after circumcision and vesicular lesions the following day, according to a press release from the city health department.
